hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); check_draft() { local cmd="$1"; local stripped=$(echo "$cmd" | sed "s/[\"']//g"); if echo "$stripped" | grep -q 'gh.*pr.*create' && echo "$stripped" | grep -qE '(^|\s)--draft(\s|$)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Draft PRs are not allowed per CLAUDE.md. Remove --draft to open as ready for review."}}'; return 0; fi; return 1; }; if ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1; then check_draft "$INPUT"; exit 0; fi; CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; check_draft "$CMD"
